name: Xianhe Co.,Ltd.
summary: Xianhe Co., Ltd. develops and produces specialty papers, pulps, paper products, and relevant chemical additives in China. Its products include cigarette industry paper, decorative base paper, commercial and communication paper and anti-fake paper, low basis weight publishing and printing paper, transfer printing base paper, food and medical packing paper, label release paper, electrical and industrial paper, and specialty pulp products. The company is headquartered in Quzhou, China.
